infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Allow Cuadrilla to use the microphone for Spanish dictation.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: Allow Cuadrilla to convert speech into text for WhatsApp drafts.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Cuadrilla to attach before-and-after job photos to service records.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Allow Cuadrilla to save service evidence photos when needed.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Cuadrilla to use the microphone for Spanish dictation.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow Cuadrilla to convert speech into text for WhatsApp drafts.
